final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: digital-art-illustration
Asset type: fantasy concept art, high detail
Primary request: deep-sea fantasy world with ancient underwater ruins and bioluminescent creatures
Scene/backdrop: ancient civilization ruins at thousands of meters deep, massive stone columns and arches covered in coral and sea anemones, mysterious underwater cityscape
Subject: mermaid princess in ancient attire examining a stone tablet with mysterious runes, surrounded by bioluminescent creatures
Style/medium: digital painting, fantasy illustration, highly detailed
Composition/framing: wide establishing shot, centered on the mermaid princess with ruins and creatures surrounding her
Lighting/mood: bioluminescent glow from deep-sea creatures, mysterious and dreamlike atmosphere
Color palette: deep blue-black base tones, accented with bioluminescent cyan-green, purple, and golden light spots
Materials/textures: weathered ancient stone with coral growth, translucent jellyfish, glowing organic textures
Constraints: maintain the ancient underwater ruin setting, keep the mermaid princess as focal point examining the rune tablet, preserve the bioluminescent color accents
Avoid: daylight, surface water effects, cartoon style, oversaturated colors, low detail, flat lighting
